claim_text: Postverbal 緊 marks progressive aspect relative to a reference time.
limitation: Terminology and discourse analysis do not establish Canto Span node boundaries.

claim_text: Main-clause dynamic V緊O is attested and contrasts with V住.
limitation: The article advances a particular dynamic/static and nominalization analysis not adopted wholesale.

claim_text: 緊 is distinct from 住, 過, 咗, and 吓 in the outer-aspect inventory.
limitation: The HPSG implementation is explicitly partial and does not establish exhaustive compatibility.

claim_text: A closed action-verb list cannot define all V緊 compatibility.
evidence_scope: examples 嚟緊, 病緊, 買緊樓; corpus examples
limitation: Occurrence does not prove unrestricted productivity.

claim_text: 有 + V緊 is disputed, rare, and context-sensitive rather than categorically absent.
evidence_scope: pp. 4-5 notes and example (5); pp. 22-23 example (24b)
limitation: One study and its judgments do not settle population-wide acceptability or innovation status.

claim_text: The tested future/modal 會 + V緊 context is rejected.
limitation: Do not generalize from one contrast to every modal or future progressive context.

claim_text: 問緊錫條同埋錫線 occurs in direct Cantonese hearing dialogue.
limitation: One coordinated-object token in one proceeding; occurrence only.

claim_text: 我哋而家睇緊呢個 occurs in direct official hearing dialogue.
limitation: One demonstrative-object token in one proceeding; occurrence only.

claim_text: 我哋而家就睇緊啲九巴嘅數據 occurs in a live interpreted hearing transcript.
limitation: The Cantonese line is marked as interpreted speech; it is not evidence about the original speaker or spontaneous non-interpreted production.

claim_text: 佢喺屋企整緊布甸 occurs in the modern vernacular corpus reported by Kataoka.
limitation: The source corpus is edited radio-drama/book dialogue, not spontaneous conversation.
